generated_from: profile-level metadata only (no row re-read, no XLSX re-parse)

worksheets.recommended_role: Reference catalogue of Adobe data-feed columns. Source of metric and dimension *candidates* via business Notes tagging.
data_quality_findings: Notes column ~95.6% null; only 'Anomaly Detection' (9) and a header echo (1) populated.
Data-type column dominated by varchar(255) (97 of 225); long tail of 27 distinct dtypes including varchar(100) (23), tinyint unsigned (23), text (18), int unsigned (9).
First column carries a long Adobe documentation paragraph as its header; flagged as sensitive by profile heuristic and treated abstractly in the shareable doc.

worksheets.recommended_role: Adobe conversion / persistent-dimension (eVar) metadata catalogue. Source of dimension candidates for segmentation, triage, and routing.
data_quality_findings: Description column 100% null — no business descriptions present in the profile.
Example Value(s) column 100% null — no example values present in the profile.
Name column has duplicate values (e.g., 'Language' x2, 'User Type' x2); slot disambiguation required before use as a semantic key.
Status reasonably populated and clean (Enabled 93 / Disabled 107).
Metric candidate 'Example Value(s)' is flagged by heuristic but is fully null; not usable as a metric column.

worksheets.recommended_role: Adobe traffic / pathing (prop) metadata catalogue. Reserve for segmentation and pathing analysis until business mapping improves.
data_quality_findings: Description, Example Value(s), and Notes columns are all 100% null.
Name column 32% null — roughly 24 of 75 slots lack a friendly label.
Zero Notes-based 'Anomaly Detection' tagging indicates absence of current business tagging, not absence of future utility.

worksheets.recommended_role: Adobe event / metric metadata catalogue. Primary source of event-count metric candidates for anomaly detection.
data_quality_findings: Status has casing inconsistency: 'Enabled' (93) vs 'ENABLED' (55) vs 'Disabled' (160); normalize before any aggregation or filtering.
Friendly Name 79.6% null — many events lack business-friendly labels and require mapping.
Description 87.6% null with a single masked value dominating populated rows; not directly usable as descriptive metadata.
'post_event_list number' is flagged as a timestamp candidate by heuristic but is structurally a slot index / join key (range 1..20999, 100% distinct). Treat as identifier, not time.

cross_sheet_summary.no_observed_metric_values_present: Example Value(s) and Description columns are null where present. This is a metadata catalogue, not measurement data.
shared_governance_concerns: Description columns are heuristically flagged sensitive on three sheets.
data_feed_columns first column (Adobe documentation paragraph) flagged sensitive due to length and content.
Friendly Name and Name columns require deduplication and missing-value remediation before use as join keys.

limitations: Profile supports sheet-level and column-level conclusions only.
No per-row slot-to-business-name mapping is derivable from the profile alone.
Notes text beyond the 'Anomaly Detection' tag is not preserved in the profile.
Top-value lists in the source profile are masked or truncated; do not rely on them for raw values.
post_prop has zero Notes-tagged rows — absence of tagging, not absence of future utility.
Metric candidates flagged by heuristic ('Example Value(s)') are fully null and not usable as metric columns; they are metadata slots.

exclusions.rationale: These files were listed conditionally ('only if available') and are not present in the workspace; they were not used.
